entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2017 that suffered an approximately USD 27 million hot-wallet and supply-chain security incident in July 2025, temporarily interrupting services before restoration and a full-compensation commitment.
entity.notes: BigONE remains active. The July 2025 incident affected hot-wallet assets and caused temporary service interruptions, while the exchange stated that private keys and cold storage were safe and that losses would be covered.

expected.summary: Centralized exchange that suffered an approximately USD 27 million supply-chain / hot-wallet breach in July 2025. The exchange said private keys and cold storage remained safe, pledged full user compensation, and described service restoration rather than a terminal shutdown.
expected.notes: Included because HEI tracks major state-changing exchange events, not only deaths. Keep entity active unless later evidence shows unresolved service failure or closure. The 2025 breach should be modeled through hack, deposit_suspended, and trading_halted events with limited event effects.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2017 that suffered an approximately USD 27 million hot-wallet and supply-chain security incident in July 2025, temporarily interrupting services before restoration and a full-compensation commitment.
changes.notes: BigONE remains active. The July 2025 incident affected hot-wallet assets and caused temporary service interruptions, while the exchange stated that private keys and cold storage were safe and that losses would be covered.

events.title: BigONE disclosed a USD 27 million security incident
events.description: BigONE reported that a third-party supply-chain attack modified operating logic and enabled unauthorized transfers from hot wallets, with losses estimated at approximately USD 27 million.
events.notes: The exchange committed to fully cover affected assets and treated the interruption as recoverable rather than terminal.

events.title: BigONE restored deposits and trading after maintenance
events.description: BigONE reported that deposit and trading services had been restored after the incident, while withdrawals were scheduled to return after additional security reinforcement.
events.notes: Restoration occurred in stages, with withdrawals returning later than deposits and trading.

evidence.title: Announcement Regarding BigONE Security Incident on 16 July 2025
evidence.notes: Initial official disclosure of the attack and service interruption.

evidence.title: BigONE Security Incident Disclosure and Progress Update
evidence.notes: Official progress update describing the attack vector, estimated loss, compensation commitment, and restoration plan.

evidence.title: BigONE System Maintenance Update
evidence.notes: Official restoration update for deposits and trading, with withdrawals still pending additional safeguards.

evidence.title: BigONE official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current official domain confirming continued exchange operation.
